amendatorysection.para: For purposes of sections 27-414 and 27-415, offense of sexual assault means:
(2) Sexual abuse by a school worker under section 28-316.01;
(3) Sexual assault of a child under section 28-319.01 or 28-320.01;
(4) Sexual assault by use of an electronic communication device under section 28-320.02;
(5) Sexual abuse of an inmate, a parolee, a probationer, or a problem solving court participant under sections 28-322.01 to 28-322.03;
(6) Sexual abuse of a protected individual under section 28-322.04;
(7) Sexual abuse of a detainee under section 28-322.05;
(8) Sexual abuse by a conservator, guardian, or guardian ad litem under section 28-322.06;
(9) Sexual abuse by a child welfare service provider under section 28-322.07;
(10) An attempt or conspiracy to commit any of the crimes listed in this section; or
(11) The commission of or conviction for a crime in another jurisdiction that is substantially similar to any crime listed in this section.
